chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 1051 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority: 1. For hearing of CMA No.4707/2019 (Stay): 2. For hearing of main case: 05.05.2020: Mr. Muhammad Arshad Khan Tanoli, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khurram Ghayas, advocate for KDA. Mr. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Additional A.G. ----------- This matter was heard at length on 19.03.2020 when a proposal was submitted by KDA for settlement of the outstanding pension and other post-retirement benefits of all its retired employees, an undertaking was given by the Director General and Member Finance KDA, and certain directions were given to them for the above purpose. Compliance report dated 30.04.2020 has been filed by the Member (Finance) KDA in partial compliance of order dated 19.03.2020. Learned counsel for KDA states that compliance of the above order has been made to the extent of opening a new bank account. Regarding the other directions contained in the above order, he requests that the time frame mentioned in the said order be extended in view of the situation prevailing in the city / country due to Coronavirus. He undertakes that the public notice regarding intimation for payment of pension to all retired employees of KDA shall be published in newspapers within fifteen days from today. In view of the request made by him, the date of payment of 10% amount of the post-retirement benefits to all KDA employees is extended till 30.06.2020 and that of the remaining 90% is extended till 31.12.2020. On the last date of hearing, learned counsel for KDA had filed a statement dated 17.03.2020 which was taken on record.

In view of the request made by him, the date of payment of 10% amount of the post-retirement benefits to all KDA employees is extended till 30.06.2020 and that of the remaining 90% is extended till 31.12.2020. On the last date of hearing, learned counsel for KDA had filed a statement dated 17.03.2020 which was taken on record. Along with the above statement, a photo stat copy of the order passed in the present petition by us on 17.03.2020 was attached on which our signatures were also appearing. The said copy was not a certified copy, but was a scanned copy of the original order. Learned counsel states that the above copy was obtained by Mr. Muhammad Ishaq advocate, Junior Law Officer of KDA. Issue notice to Mr. Muhammad Ishaq advocate to appear before this Court in person on the next date of hearing along with his written explanation for violating the Rules of this Court and the code of conduct of advocates. For further hearing and compliance of our above directions, adjourned to 06.07.2020. J U D G E J U D G E
